evidence: frontend/src/lib/enums/coachingMode.ts — AI_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL slugs exploratory/exploratory_/guided/direct map to bTIFK/bTIFO/bTIFP/bTIFQ
ir/inventory.json — bTIFa action_type ChangeThing under bTIFU (/api/bTIFW); ai_confidence_level_option_ai_confidence_level_os user field

frontend/src/lib/userProfile/userProfileHooks.ts — onModulesCompletedCountChanged guards previousCount !== currentCount (OldDataItem vs CurrentDataItem parity); patches modules_completed_count_number + ai_confidence_level_option_ai_confidence_level_os
frontend/src/lib/userProfile/userProfileHooks.ts — incrementModulesCompletedCount loads prior count, increments, invokes handler
frontend/src/lib/paths/pathsSessionApi.ts — schedulePathSessionCompletion calls incrementModulesCompletedCount(user.id) after PATHS-07 session submit
frontend/src/lib/paths/pathsSessionApi.ts — client-side patch via patchOnboardingAndResults; no adapter route or edge-function fetch
frontend/supabase/functions/ — no confidence/modules_completed edge function present
cursor-impl-cycle/output/decompose/MOD-DRSAM-API.json — scope documents client-side patch after PATHS-07 session completion as acceptable workaround

functional_audit.check: computeAiConfidenceLevel maps modules_completed_count_number to correct ai_confidence_level_os slug at tier boundaries (0→exploratory, 1–2→exploratory_, 3–5→guided, 6+→direct)
Path session completion submit increments modules_completed_count_number and patches ai_confidence_level in profiles.onboarding_data
Confidence recompute skipped when modules count unchanged (bTIFW trigger condition parity)
Brownfield preflight documents extend of existing pathsSessionApi stub with mapped target paths

ui_evidence.notes: No DOM surface; backend trigger ported to client lib. bTIFa ChangeThing range_contains_point logic implemented as computeAiConfidenceLevel tier thresholds in resolveAiConfidenceLevel.ts
ChangeThing side-effect mirrored by patchOnboardingAndResults setting ai_confidence_level_option_ai_confidence_level_os alongside modules_completed_count_number

critiques.finding: No unit tests cover computeAiConfidenceLevel boundary values (0, 1, 2, 3, 5, 6) or onModulesCompletedCountChanged no-op when previous === current.
critiques.alternative: Add table-driven tests asserting slug output per modules_completed_count_number and a guard test for unchanged count.

critiques.finding: Bubble user fields modules_completed_count_number and ai_confidence_level_option_ai_confidence_level_os are patched into profiles.onboarding_data JSONB (prototype schema has no flat user columns); downstream consumers must read the same JSONB keys.
critiques.alternative: Document JSONB key contract in userProfileHooks.ts or add typed profile columns in a future migration if project/supabase adopts flat Bubble user fields.

critiques.finding: bTIFU DatabaseTriggerEvent would fire on any modules_completed_count_number change; implementation only hooks PATHS session completion increment (+1) — no generic post-update subscription for count changes from other writers.
critiques.alternative: Accept as intentional per AC-3 client-side workaround; add explicit call sites if other flows later mutate modules_completed_count_number.

critiques.finding: bTIFW/bTIFa range_contains_point numeric breakpoints were inferred from implementation (≤0/≤2/≤5) and ENUM-03 slug ordering; monolithic drsam-99657.bubble action payload was not independently byte-extracted in this review pass.
critiques.alternative: Add explicit threshold constants with Bubble source comments or a fixture extracted from /api/bTIFW/actions/0 for reviewer-verifiable parity.
